name: Compagnia Immobiliare Azionaria S.p.A.
summary: Compagnia Immobiliare Azionaria S.p.A. operates in the real estate sector in Italy. It leases and sells real estate properties. The company also offers timeshare management services; and delivers facility, such as routine maintenance, adjustment of structures and facilities, ancillary services, and other services. In addition, it invests in agriculture and farm holidays. The company was founded in 2002 and is based in Milan, Italy.
